holdings.infoBox: PBOG is an equity ETF with a total of 38 individual holdings. The top holdings are Exxon Mobil stock at 17.75%, Chevron at 11.21%, Shell at 7.14%, TotalEnergies SE at 5.19%, and BP p.l.c. at 4.72%.

overview.description: The Portfolio Building Block Integrated Oil and Gas and Exploration and Production Index ETF (PBOG) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the BITA Global Oil & Gas Select index. The fund tracks a rules-based index of energy companies that derive at least 50% of their revenue from Oil and Gas and Exploration and Production. Securities are selected using BITAs thematic methodology and weighted by market cap. PBOG was launched on Nov 24, 2025 and is issued by Portfolio Building Block.
infoTable: BITA Global Oil & Gas Select Index
